raw.problem: Standing crops are damaged by disease detected too late by scouting.
raw.why_now: Cheap drones + vision models enable weekly scouting.
raw.success_scenario: If input savings beat fee, adoption is automatic.

structured.tagline: Eliminate avoidable crop loss from disease with early drone-vision scouting.
structured.problem: Standing crops are damaged by disease detected too late by scouting.
structured.differentiator: Combines agri-engineers with CV researchers for cheap weekly drone-based crop scouting.
structured.solution: Weekly drone-vision scouting service that reduces fungicide use by 30%.
